name: id
description: SHA-256 derived deterministic ID for deduplication

name: title
description: Title or headline of the item

name: summary
description: Short text summary used for sentiment scoring

name: published_date
description: Date the item was published or approved

name: company_name
description: Pharma company: sponsor for FDA/ClinicalTrials, matched company for news

name: sentiment_label
description: FinBERT output label: positive | negative | neutral

name: sentiment_score
description: Confidence score for the sentiment label (0.0 to 1.0)

name: ingested_at
description: UTC timestamp when this row was written to BigQuery
